sections.sectionTitle: A Paktat Mahmah Numei tungah Thukhenna

verses.text: Tua ciangin hai sagih a tawi vantung mi sagihte sung panin kei kiangah khat hong pai a, “Hong pai in; gun tampi gei-ah a kilam a paktat mahmah khuapi gimna a kipiakzia ding ka hong lak ding hi
Leitung kumpite in tua a paktat mahmahnu tawh gamtat hoihlo gamta uh a, leitung mite in ama paktatna leenggahzu dawnin a kham uh hi,” hong ci hi

Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin ka om a, vantung mi in gamlak mun khatah hong tun'pih hi. Tua lai-ah, a tungah min hoihlo nam tuamtuam a dimin a kigelh ganhing a san khat tungah numei khat a tu ka mu hi. Tua ganhing in lutang sagih leh ki sawm a nei hi

Tua numei in puan a dupsan leh a ausan silh a, kham, suangmanpha, leh kep kibawl kizepna a tuamtuamte tawh a pumpi dimin kizem a, a paktatna hangin a kihhuai a nin mahmah nate a dimin a omna kham hai khat a tawi hi
A taltang tungah, “A paktat numeite leh leitung kihhuainate khempeuh a pian'na, A Lian Babylon Khuapi,” ci-in khiatna tuamkhat a nei min a kigelh hi
Tua ciangin mi siangthote leh Jesuh tungah a cihtak uh manin a kithat mite' sisan dawnin zukham a batna ka mu hi. Tua numei ka muh ciangin lamdang ka sa mahmah hi
Ahi zongin vantung mi in keima kiangah, “Bang hangin lamdangsa na hi hiam? Tua numei leh amah a pua, lutang sagih leh ki sawm a nei ganhing a cihnopna thu ka hong gen ding hi

Tua na muh ganhing nidangin a om hangin tu-in om nawnlo hi. Ahi zongin tu-in kuahawm thukpi panin hong pusuakin sihna a thuakdingin paikhia ding hi. Tua ganhing nidangin omngei a, tu-in om nawnlo napi-in khatvei hong kilangkik ding ahih manin, a nungta mite' min a kikhumna laibu sungah leitung pian'ma-in a kigelh nailo, tu laitakin leitungah a om mite in tua ganhing a et uh ciangin lamdangsa ding uh hi
Hih thu-ah pilna leh thutheihna kisam hi. Lutang sagihte pen tua numei a tutna mual sagih ahi hi

Tua lutang sagihte pen kumpi sagihte zong a cihna ahi hi. Tua kumpi sagihte lakah nga beizo a, khat in ukna aana neilai a, khat pen a hong piang lai ding ahi hi. Amah a hong kilat ciangin tomno sung bek om ding hi
Nidangin omngei a, ahi zongin tu-in a om nawnlo ganhing pen kumpi sagihte tawh a kipawl a kumpi giatna hi a, sihna thuakdingin a paiding ahi hi
Ki sawmte pen gam uk dingin a hong kipan nailo kumpi sawm hi a, ahi zongin a ganhing tawh kumpi aana a neikhawm dingin nai khat sung bek a hun kipia ding hi
Hih mi sawmte in ngimna khat nei uh a, vangliatna leh aana a neihteng uh a ganhing tungah a pia uh hi
Amaute in Tuuno a sim ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Tuuno pen kumpite' Kumpi, topate' Topa ahih manin, amah leh ama sap, a teel, citakin amah a zuite in tua kumpi sawmte a zogawp ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi in hong genthuah lai a, “A paktat numei a tutna gun tuite pen minam tuamtuam, pau nam tuamtuam a zang mihonpite ahi hi
Tua na muh ganhing leh a ki sawmte in a paktat numei mudah ding uh hi. Ama neih khempeuh laksakin a pumguakin koih ding uh a, a sa ne-in mei tawh haltum ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama thugente a tun'theihna dingin ama deihna bangin amaute in a sepnopna ding uh lungsim guan' a, lungsim kikhatin ganhing tungah amau' ukna aana a piasak hi
Na muh numei pen leitung kumpi khempeuh tungah ukna a nei khuapi ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
